title: Dividend Champion, Contender, And Challenger Highlights: Week Of April 30
text: A weekly summary of dividend activity for Dividend Champions, Contenders, and Challengers. Companies which changed their dividends.

title: CMS Energy (CMS) Q1 Earnings Surpass Estimates
text: CMS Energy (CMS) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.70 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.66 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.20 per share a year ago.

title: CMS Energy Announces First Quarter Results, Reaffirms 2023 Adjusted EPS Guidance
text: JACKSON, Mich. , April 27, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- CMS Energy announced today reported earnings per share of $0.69 for the first quarter of 2023, compared to $1.21 per share for the same quarter in 2022.

title: What's in the Offing for CMS Energy (CMS) in Q1 Earnings?
text: CMS Energy's (CMS) first-quarter results are likely to reflect moderate weather pattern amid increased operation and maintenance expense.

title: CMS Energy to Announce 2023 First Quarter Results on April 27
text: JACKSON, Mich. , April 6, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- CMS Energy announced today it will provide 2023 first quarter results along with a business and financial outlook at 9:00 a.m.
